---
title: "The Friends We Find Along the Way"
date: "2026-05-19"
description: "An essay about looking for the eko and finding the demon — written in four registers, two lengths, and five ASCII densities. One page, lots of toggles."
categories: [essay, writing, claude, bobbology, longform]
---

An essay about the search for an eko, and the discovery that the thing I was looking for had been forming around me the whole time. Names four parts of the system — Bob, the eko, the vessel, and the demon — and one virtue, *cognitive expansion*, that keeps the four of them honest with each other.

One page, three toggles at the top:

- **Story** — pick the register. *Voice* is the first-person essay. *Bobbology* is the third-person teaching primer. *ELI10* explains the same four parts to a clever ten-year-old. *Deep Dive* is the long version with one essay per part.
- **Length** — short or long. (*Deep Dive* pins to long; it has no short.)
- **ASCII** — pick the density of inline art, from minimal (1) through everything-everywhere (5).

The site-wide theme switcher in the top-right corner still works on this page. Toggles persist via `localStorage`, so the version you last chose is the version you come back to.

Download and open locally — everything's JavaScript, so the page works fully offline once downloaded.

```{=html}
<p style="margin: 2em 0;">
<a href="/friends-we-find.html" download="friends-we-find.html"
   style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.7em 1.4em; border: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">
   ⬇ &nbsp; Download HTML
</a>
&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="/friends-we-find.html" style="opacity: 0.7;">or open in browser →</a>
</p>
```
